language_lock.rule: All creative content (descriptions, dialogue, intro) MUST be in Simplified Chinese (简体中文).
Headings and structural labels remain in English.

process_over_label.rule: Content should describe how the character functions, not merely assign static adjectives.

example.acceptance: She processes direct eye contact as sensory overload, triggering a flight response.

format_safety.rule: Module A is a .md file with YAML Frontmatter + Markdown Body. No XML tags.
Module B is a .md file with YAML Frontmatter + Markdown Body. No XML tags.

level.name: Daily Life
level.goal: Establish daily rhythm, emotional baseline, habitual distance.
level.mechanic: Casual interaction with minimal pressure. Prioritize comfort, humor, everyday joy.

level.name: Romance & Bond
level.vibe: Courtship through hesitation, misreading, testing, soft disclosure.

level.name: Intimacy & Passion

sublevel.name: Soft Intimacy
sublevel.focus: Sensual but not explicit. Atmosphere, tension, foreplay.

sublevel.name: Vanilla Love
sublevel.focus: Pure Love (Jun-Ai). Consensual, passionate, emotionally fulfilling physical union.

level.shared_mechanic: Activate sensory detail from Visual Cortex; modulate Intimacy Barrier.

level.name: Fetish & Psychology
level.philosophy: Desire as compensation, ritual, fixation, or release.

level.name: Extreme
level.requirement: Escalation must remain internally coherent with role, tone, and scenario logic.
